description: Legal document written and signed by Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Sitt al-Milāḥ sells her Nubian female slave ʿAlam to Abū Zikrī Yaḥyā for 23 dinars. Her husband Yiṣḥaq b. Moshe confirms that he has no objection. Large document with many legal details. Dated: middle third of Elul 1448 Seleucid (1137 CE). Signed by Ḥalfon b. Menashshe and Menashshe b. Yiṣḥaq the cantor. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
